name: vibe-pill-calls
title: Vibe Pill Hotline Call Logs
description: Call analytics, member profiles, and application tracking for The Vibe Pill membership hotline. Includes identity resolution, membership funnel tracking, and engagement analytics.

sources.name: vapi_webhook
sources.description: VAPI webhook integration for Vibe Pill hotline calls

resources.name: calls
resources.description: Call records with member identity and pathway tracking

resources.name: member_profiles
resources.description: Persistent member identity and engagement records

resources.name: daily_analysis
resources.description: Daily LLM-generated call and funnel analysis

privacy.description: Contains member PII (phone, name, email) for identity resolution and personalized service. Access restricted to V and authorized system components.
privacy.pii_policy: Member identity stored with consent for membership service delivery. Phone numbers in E.164 format serve as primary keys for identity resolution.
privacy.escalation_policy: Escalations contain contact info for V's direct follow-up with member consent.
